quotes.verbatim_quote: There won't be any Type 3 - 4A.. it’s just the way the instrument works out.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Structural rule defining the boundaries of the Type 3 system on the guitar.

quotes.verbatim_quote: INSTEAD OF OR IN ADDITION TO THE #9
quotes.why_load_bearing: Performance rule: the altered #9 can substitute for or supplement the natural 9.
Marks deliberate scope boundary — certain techniques deferred to a later volume.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Also try this run an octave higher in the same position.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Pedagogical rule: every pattern should be practiced an octave higher in the same fingerboard position.
Supplementary section providing arpeggios extending altered dominant patterns into the upper register.
